title: LotusPBR
description: A Stylized PBR pack that enhance the visual of your world!
body:
![Lotus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b1598062a5b6b62fb7873ecf4e353ee46dcdbcd.png)
### **A PBR Pack That Enhance Your Visual Experience In Minecraft!**

The Pack Is Still In Work In Progress So It Will Have Some Unfinished Blocks Or Error To Report It Please Join This Server Below
- [Discord server!!](https://discord.gg/PvTzZQumpB)

### **GET EARLY ACCESS AND HIGHER RESOLUTIONS:**
>### [PATREON](https://patreon.com/YoonART?utm_medium=unknown&utm_source=join_link&utm_campaign=creatorshare_creator&utm_content=copyLink)
## **Shader Recommended:**
- [Kappa Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/kappa-shader)
- [Nostalgia Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/nostalgia-shader)
- [Bliss shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/bliss-shader)
- [Complementary shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)

> ### **Update:**

- Update more textures!
- Custom Model for most leaves
- Add Amethyst Cluster Model
- Fix some PBR bug on some shaders
- And more!
